settings.label: Lightbox Contents
settings.description: Whether the lightbox shows just the displayed image or the full gallery.

settings.label: Fit Media to Screen
settings.description: Scales images to fit the screen. Turn off to show images at their natural size.

settings.label: Show Fullscreen Button
settings.description: Adds a fullscreen button to the lightbox toolbar.

settings.label: Show Button Tooltips
settings.description: Show labels when hovering over lightbox toolbar buttons.

settings.label: Loop Gallery
settings.description: After the last item, loop back to the first. When off, navigation stops at each end.

settings.label: Hide Arrows at First and Last Item
settings.description: Hides the previous arrow on the first item and the next arrow on the last when loop is off.

settings.label: Drag Thumbnails
settings.description: Allow visitors to drag the thumbnail strip with a mouse on desktop.

settings.label: Swipe Thumbnails
settings.description: Allow visitors to swipe the thumbnail strip on touch devices.

settings.label: Show Info Panel
settings.description: Display image details (caption, description, EXIF, and more) alongside the lightbox.

settings.label: Default Panel State
settings.description: Whether the info panel starts open or collapsed. Visitors can toggle it either way.

settings.label: Info Panel Blocks
settings.description: Choose which blocks appear in the info panel. Drag to reorder.

settings.subtitle: No info panel blocks selected
settings.message: The info panel won't appear in the lightbox until you add at least one block above.

settings.label: Credit Source
settings.description: Where to pull the credit text from.

settings.subtitle: Share block won't appear
settings.message: The Share block is selected, but social sharing is turned off site-wide. Turn it on under FotoGrids → Settings → Sharing for the share buttons to show in the lightbox.

settings.label: Enable Image Zoom
settings.description: Allow visitors to zoom into images in the lightbox.

settings.label: Zoom Trigger
settings.description: How visitors activate zoom. Scroll and pinch always work regardless of this setting.

settings.label: Show Zoom Buttons
settings.description: Adds zoom in and zoom out buttons to the lightbox toolbar.

settings.label: Allow Zooming Beyond Original Size
settings.description: Let visitors zoom in further than the image's actual resolution.
